'''tapongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabinetful|cabinetful]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-p-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabinetful|cabinetful]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tapongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæpengeth|tæpengeth]] || [[word:tæpengej|tæpengej]] || [[word:tæpengesh|tæpengesh]] || [[word:tæpenge|tæpenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tapopongoth|tapopongoth]] || [[word:tapopongoj|tapopongoj]] || [[word:tapopongosh|tapopongosh]] || [[word:tapopongo|tapopongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tapongoth|tapongoth]] || [[word:tapongoj|tapongoj]] || [[word:tapongosh|tapongosh]] || [[word:tapongo|tapongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tapofngoth|tapofngoth]] || [[word:tapofngoj|tapofngoj]] || [[word:tapofngosh|tapofngosh]] || [[word:tapofngof|tapofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tapongotho|tapongotho]] || [[word:tapongojo|tapongojo]] || [[word:tapongosho|tapongosho]] || [[word:tapongoko|tapongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tapongoth|tapongoth]] || [[word:tapongoj|tapongoj]] || [[word:tapongosh|tapongosh]] || [[word:tapongo|tapongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tapongothol|tapongothol]] || [[word:tapongojol|tapongojol]] || [[word:tapongoshol|tapongoshol]] || [[word:tapongokol|tapongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tapongothotho|tapongothotho]] || [[word:tapongojojo|tapongojojo]] || [[word:tapongoshosho|tapongoshosho]] || [[word:tapongoko|tapongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tapongothon|tapongothon]] || [[word:tapongojon|tapongojon]] || [[word:tapongoshon|tapongoshon]] || [[word:tapongokon|tapongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tapongothoro|tapongothoro]] || [[word:tapongojoro|tapongojoro]] || [[word:tapongoshoro|tapongoshoro]] || [[word:tapongokoro|tapongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
